title: Coco Crinkle
description: Published by user. Prompt: A single-frame flat 2D digital graphic design layout for a continuous snack packaging wrapper, landscape orientation. The background is a clean, solid off-white cream color. The top and bottom edges are framed with flat, stylized dark brown liquid chocolate splashes. CENTER FRONT PANEL: large bubbly bold brown title "CHOCO CRINKLE" centered prominently, with a flat 2D illustration of cracked chocolate cookies resting on small chocolate chips below. LEFT AND RIGHT OUTER AREAS: reserved for back and side information layout, keeping enough clean cream space for ingredient text, nutrition facts, brand message, manufacturer information, and barcode. Strictly flat orthographic packaging design, seamless continuous wrapper layout, clean packaging graphic, pure 2D digital art.
